name: Consented flow avatar minting group tokens (isPermittedFlow bug)
description: Bug reproduction: Consented flow avatar sends tokens to recipient via group minting (Circles Backers group). Source has simulated consented flow enabled. Before fix, ValidateConsentedFlow ran BEFORE InsertRouterInTransfers, causing Avatar→Group edges to be filtered. After fix, InsertRouterInTransfers runs first, creating Avatar→Router→Group edges. Tests that consented flow avatars can participate in group token transfers.
notes: E2E disabled: No path found - source may not have balance at this block or trust relationship may be missing.
